svg.title: Shadow Service Architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing how the Shadow Service NuGet package sits passively between ASP.NET middleware and a REST API backend, mirroring traffic to a capture store without modifying any request or response.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of clients call the API?')
sendPrompt('What does the ShadowInterceptor do exactly?')
sendPrompt('What is a controller in ASP.NET?')
sendPrompt('Why use an async queue inside the shadow service?')
sendPrompt('What does the background writer worker do?')
sendPrompt('How do I write captured traffic to a SQL database?')
sendPrompt('How do I write captured traffic to a JSON file?')
sendPrompt('How do I write captured traffic to an in-memory store?')
sendPrompt('What REST endpoints should the shadow service expose?')
sendPrompt('How do I filter captured traffic by endpoint?')
sendPrompt('What does the stats endpoint return?')
